expectations.text: Skill does NOT output 'nothing to catch up on' bail-out message
expectations.evidence: Output contains exact text: 'On main — nothing to catch up on.' Skill bailed out at Step 1.

expectations.text: Output contains a Catchup Briefing section
expectations.evidence: Output does not contain 'Catchup Briefing'. Skill stopped before producing any briefing.

expectations.text: Output contains a Recent Changes section listing commits
expectations.evidence: Output does not contain 'Recent Changes'. Skill stopped before producing any content.
